popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from Cokayne's Complete Peerage, 2nd Edition, (Zouche), Vol. XIIB, p. 930

...mentioned as the mother of Alan la Zouche, wife of Geoffrey, vicomté de Porhoët, and the daughter of Alan Fergant, D …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany於大約1100年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰時，她的父親Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne39歲，母親Ermengarde d'Anjou33歲。她於1105年與Baudouin VII de Flandre在法國福藍德 福藍薩結婚。她去世於1190年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈靈頓享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany于大约1100年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰时，她的父亲Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne39岁，母亲Ermengarde d'Anjou33岁。她于1105年与Baudouin VII de Flandre在法国福藍德 福藍薩结婚。她去世于1190年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈靈頓享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Renne  .
English and Irish: variant of   Rainey  .

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany was born about 1100, in Rohan, Morbihan, Brittany, France, her father, Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, was 39 and her mother, Ermengarde d'Anjou, was 33. She married Baudouin VII de Flandre in 1105, in French Flanders, France. She died in 1190, in Harrington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany est née environ 1100, à Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde d'Anjou, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Baudouin VII de Flandre en 1105, à Flandre française, France. Elle est décédée en 1190, à Harrington, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany um 1100 in Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne 39 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde d'Anjou 33. Sie hat 1105 in Flandre française, Frankreich Baudouin VII de Flandre geheiratet. Sie starb 1190 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Harrington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany è nata il circa 1100 nel Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde d'Anjou, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Baudouin VII de Flandre nel 1105, nel Flandre française, Francia. Morì nel 1190, nel Harrington, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittanyが約1100年にフランスブレタグンモービハンロハンで生まれた時，父Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagneは39歳，母Ermengarde d'Anjouは33歳であった。1105年にフランスフランダー フランcアイゼでBaudouin VII de Flandreと結婚した。彼女は1190年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリントンで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany(이)가 대략 1100년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 로핸에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde d'Anjou(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1105년 프랑스 플랜드르 프랜c아이스에서 Baudouin VII de Flandre(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링턴에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde d'Anjou, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Baudouin VII de Flandre em 1105, em Flandre française, França. Ela faleceu em 1190, em Harrington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos.

ru.Jerusalem, Kingdom of Jerusalem: джирсеилем, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany родилась около 1100 г. в местности рохань, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde d'Anjou, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baudouin VII de Flandre в 1105 г. в местности фландр франcеис, Франция. Она умерла в 1190 г. в местности харрингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany nació aproximadamente 1100, en Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Alain IV de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ermengarde d'Anjou, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Baudouin VII de Flandre en 1105, en Flandre française, Francia. Murió en 1190, en Harrington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años.
